projects.title: Pathology Image-Text Structured Alignment Based on Multiple Instance Learning
projects.intro: The pathology foundation model trained on massive pathological texts provides strong pathology image-text alignment capabilities.
projects.description: The pathology foundation model trained on massive pathological texts provides strong pathology image-text alignment capabilities, offering a new solution to the original pathology image analysis problems based on multiple instance learning. The combination of these two technologies can provide higher quality, reliable, and interpretable solutions for a variety of downstream pathology tasks, such as WSI classification and survival prediction.

paper.paperTitle: DawCa-MIL: A diagnostic reasiong follow awared instance-concept alignment framework
